changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add GIN indexes on JSONB columns for complex JSON queries

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add updated_at column to quality_measure_results for change tracking
changeSet.sql: UPDATE quality_measure_results SET updated_at = created_at WHERE updated_at IS NULL;

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add composite index for common quality measure queries

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add index for compliance tracking and reporting
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_qm_results_compliance ON quality_measure_results (tenant_id, measure_id, numerator_compliant, calculation_date DESC);
